storyHook: 找链接，下载等待，打开文件

narrative.when: 周二晚上，要用到一份重要资料
narrative.who: 甲（下载的人）· 乙（提供链接的同事）
narrative.how: 找到链接点击下载，等待完成
narrative.method: 找到资源、点击下载、等待进度完成、打开查看
narrative.event: 甲明天开会要用这份文件，担心下载太慢

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, here is the point.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great, I will get it now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Put your finger there. It is a great store of words.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see it. Two point three. That is a good amount.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, but it has all the numbers you need.
turns.zh: 嗯，但你要的数据都在里面。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I hope it goes quick. My meeting is at nine.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It will be done in ten minutes, I would say.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Ten minutes? That is not bad.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let it do its work. Do not touch the net.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will keep on here.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: How far has it got now?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Two in ten. Slow but safe.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is the slow bit. After that it goes quick.
turns.zh: 那是最慢的时候，后面就快了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I hope so. I would not like to be late to bed.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is all right. The paper is good.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is at three in ten now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Still slow. I will get a drink.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do not be long. The net may go down.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will be quick. Back in a minute.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Four in ten. That is better.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I am back. What is the time?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Ten thirty. Five to ten now.
turns.zh: 十点半。现在差十分十点。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: We are at the middle point. Not bad for a great mass.
turns.zh: 我们到中间点了。对一个大文件来说不错了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. Six in ten. Getting there.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Seven in ten. Almost done.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Eight in ten. That is a good rate.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, but I am still on edge.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Nine in ten. Almost there.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will not be happy till it is done.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Almost all done. Any second now.
turns.zh: 差不多全好了，随时会好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Come on, come on... Done!

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: At last! Let me open it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Take your time. Have a look first.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is all here. Good quality.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Great. Now you are safe.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, I will put it on the table for tomorrow.
turns.zh: 好，我把它放桌上，明天用。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You look tired. Get some rest.
turns.zh: 你看着累了，休息一下吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will, after I look at it again.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Do not be long.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Two minutes. Then I am done.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is only twenty in a hundred.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is slow. Is your net all right?
turns.zh: 是挺慢的。你网络没问题吧？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would say so. But it is a very long thing.
turns.zh: 应该没问题，但文件太大了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, two point three. It will take time.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I hope it is done before 11.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It will be. Do not keep looking at it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am at forty five now. Still going.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Get a drink while you are here.
turns.zh: 不错，趁这会儿去喝杯水。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, I will keep an eye on it. It is 80 now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Almost there. Two more minutes.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, it is at 95 now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: One minute left, I would say.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Come on, get on with it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: There, 100. Done.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Great. Let me open it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is a tight box. Give it a second.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, it is opening now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: There is a paper inside. That is the one.
turns.zh: 里面有个文件，就是这个。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Does it look all right?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, all clear. Ready for tomorrow.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I will put a copy on the table.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. Keep it safe.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: There. Now I can rest.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You did well. We are almost done.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, at nine. I will be there.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let us check the download.
turns.zh: 我们检查一下下载情况。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You too. Thanks for the help.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No trouble. All the best.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will need it. Good day.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Okay, it is ready.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, here it is.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will do it now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It says two point three. That is a good bit.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, it has all the pictures.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The line is moving. One part in ten now.
turns.zh: 进度条在动，现在十分之一。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. It will take some time.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I hope it does not stop.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The net is good tonight.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Two in ten now. Not bad.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep going. I will be here.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Three in ten now. But it is slow.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Great lists take time.
turns.zh: 是啊，大文件就是费时间。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will be up late at this rate.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take your time. It will come down.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Four in ten. Getting near one part in two.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You will have it before bed.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I hope so. Five in ten now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: See? It is moving well.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Six in ten. Not long now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Almost there. Keep quiet.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Seven in ten. Getting there.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. It will be done in a bit.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Eight in ten. Almost done.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep your eyes on it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Nine in ten. One more minute.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then you can have a rest.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done! All is taken in.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Open it. See if it is all there.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is clear, all good.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. Now you can go to bed.
turns.zh: 太好了，现在你可以睡了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will put it on the table for tomorrow.
turns.zh: 好的，我把它放在桌上，明天用。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Do not let it get mixed up.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No chance. I have a short name for it.
turns.zh: 不会的，我给它起了个短名。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What is it?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Just 'Meeting'. Simple and clear.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. Now shut down and get some sleep.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. I will be up at seven.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Quite enough time. Have a good rest.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks for your help tonight.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No trouble. Good night.

storyBlurb: 周二深夜，甲急需一份明天开会用的资料，却在下载链接前焦虑不安。同事乙发来的链接能否快速完成？
storyScript:
【开场·找到资源】周二晚上十点，甲的电脑屏幕亮着，他盯着同事乙刚发来的消息，里面是一个文件下载链接。明天早上九点的重要会议，需要这份资料才能做汇报。甲深吸一口气，移动鼠标，对准链接，轻轻一点。浏览器弹出下载窗口，文件大小显示2.3GB。他按下「保存」，进度条开始从零跳动。

【进行·等待完成】甲靠在椅背上，目光紧锁屏幕上的进度条。时间一分一秒过去，数字缓慢攀升：10%、15%、20%……他忍不住刷新页面，担心链接失效。乙发来消息：「在下载了吗？这个文件有点大。」甲回复：「嗯，才20%，好慢。」他站起身，在房间里踱步，又坐回电脑前，手指敲击桌面。窗外夜色深沉，只有下载进度条的光标在闪烁。甲想起明天汇报的紧张，手心微微出汗。

【进行·等待完成】进度条终于爬到80%，甲的心跳似乎也加速了。他盯着剩余时间估计：还有三分钟。这三分钟却像三个世纪。他点开其他网页，又关掉，生怕影响网速。终于，100%！下载完成提示音响起，甲长舒一口气，立刻双击文件。压缩包开始解压，他等待文件夹打开，里面是几个文档和图片。

【收束·打开使用】甲点开最重要的PDF，内容清晰呈现，正是他需要的图表和数据。他快速浏览一遍，确认无误后，保存到桌面。明天开会用的资料终于到手。甲关掉电脑，窗外月光洒进房间，他感到一阵轻松，终于可以安心入睡。
